programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Deal with a River House rebuild as a new garage modernizes the Country House.

programme.desc: Wait for permits and meet up with an old friend for some smart design tips.

programme.desc: Cross a river of muck as one home gets finished and a new job gets under way.

programme.desc: Debate a structural snag at the Suburban House and a business-busting curveball.

programme.desc: Review Colin’s gorgeous plan to modernize a neglected ’70s-style vacation home.

programme.desc: Go cliffside for a custom-designed deck that’s made for sunset watching.

programme.desc: Don your pirate garb for a treetop gazebo project designed for young buccaneers.

programme.desc: Survey Uchenwa and Dwayne’s abode, a starter home in need of a new beginning.

programme.desc: Meet Heather and Gord, saddled with an eyesore of a kitchen and a new housemate.

programme.title: Reno vs Relocate
programme.desc: Watch overwhelmed moms decide between more toy storage and more square footage.

programme.title: Reno vs Relocate
programme.desc: Go spelunking with Nick and Danielle, who need room for an indoor man cave.

programme.desc: Embrace healing as Mike gets a reno back on track for a mum struck by illness.

programme.desc: Navigate a rebuild designed to give a widower space to create new memories.

programme.desc: Learn how a dishonest neighbour demolished a homeowner’s trust and her kitchen.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Settle in with a newlywed couple whose honeymoon paid for surprise home repairs.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Cope with surprises, like icy pipes, that arise after a hurried home inspection.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Pick up the expensive issues missed by a home inspector who was paid in beer.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Examine an upsized upgrade that’s been nothing but trouble for a young family.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Sniff out the problems a couple missed by agreeing to a no-inspection clause.

programme.title: Lien on Me
programme.desc: See the Holmes on Homes crew fix a financial mess left by a shady contractor.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Marvel as Sarah juggles two huge projects as her daughters take on design duty.

programme.title: Sarah off the Grid
programme.desc: Monitor progress in the principal suite as moving day moves to the new year.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Size up the costs of fixing the extensive damage caused by an illegal grow op.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Flush away the rubble of two terrible, unfinished accessible bathroom renos.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Hum along as a country-singing guest star helps Mike make this kitchen right.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Suss out why the beauty of a newly remodelled bathroom is only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Open up multiple cans of worms when a porch collapse reveals shoddy workmanship.
